hero.subheadline: Driven by People, Powered by Choice.

footer.tagline: People-powered mobility and logistics — connecting riders, drivers, and communities across Africa and beyond.

about.heroHeadline: A better way to move. Designed for real journeys.
about.heroSub: Transparent pricing. Fair negotiation. Safer rides.
about.welcomeP1: Transportation should be fair, transparent, and built around the people who use it not the other way around.
about.welcomeP2: Rides gives riders and drivers the trip details, the fare logic, and the freedom to negotiate before the trip begins. Trust comes from transparency. Fairness comes from choice.

bullets.title: Transparency from the first tap
bullets.body: Riders see the route, estimated time, distance, and fare before the trip begins. Drivers know what they're earning before they accept a ride. No surprises. No hidden calculations.

bullets.title: Fairness through choice
bullets.body: Pricing should be a conversation, not a decision made by an algorithm alone. Riders and drivers can negotiate the fare before the journey starts, reaching an agreement that works for both sides.

bullets.title: Safety within reach
bullets.body: Safety isn't an afterthought. One-tap SOS support, verified identities, document checks, and a responsive support team — every ride built on a safer foundation.

bullets.title: Mutual respect by design
bullets.body: Rides is built for the people who make every journey possible — riders and drivers alike. Trust, respect, and fairness are part of every interaction.

bullets.title: Trust through action
bullets.body: Anyone can claim to care about transparency and fairness. We demonstrate it through the choices we make, the features we build, and the way we serve our community every day.

faqs.a: Rides is an app designed to make transportation more transparent, fair, and safe for both riders and drivers.
Yes. Rides is officially live and available for users.

faqs.q: How is Rides different from other apps?
faqs.a: Rides focuses on transparency and fairness. Riders see clear trip details before confirming a ride, and drivers understand their earnings upfront. We also allow fare negotiation between riders and drivers.
Before a trip starts, riders and drivers agree on a fare. Once both sides accept, the ride is confirmed. This ensures both parties agree on the price before the journey begins.

faqs.q: How does safety work on Rides?
faqs.a: Verified IDs, document checks on every driver, a one-tap emergency button, and a 24/7 support team you can reach during or after a trip.

faqs.q: Do I need a wallet to use Rides?
faqs.a: No wallet is required. Payments are handled directly between riders and drivers based on the agreed fare.
Rides is currently available in selected cities, with more locations being added as we grow.

faqs.q: How can I start using Rides?
faqs.a: You can download the app, create an account, and start booking rides immediately where the service is available.

drivers.heroHeadline: Drive on your terms, earn on your terms.
drivers.heroSub: Bring your moto, cab, hilux, or fuso. Download the Rides Driver app and start earning today.
drivers.heroNote: Read what we offer below before applying.
drivers.whyHeading: Built around the people doing the driving.
drivers.howHeading: Three steps. Most drivers are live within 48 hours.
drivers.eligibility: You will need a valid driver's licence, a working vehicle, a mobile money account, and government ID. The specifics for your vehicle are shared in-app during application.

benefits.title: Daily payouts
benefits.detail: Paid every working day, straight to your mobile money. No weekly batches, no minimum threshold.

benefits.title: Driver-first economics
benefits.detail: Transparent fares with no hidden cuts. You see what you'll earn before you accept the trip.

benefits.title: Real human support
benefits.detail: A live team in Kigali on call 24/7. When something goes wrong, someone actually answers.

benefits.title: Built in Rwanda
benefits.detail: Local team, local routes, local payment rails. We understand how Rwanda moves.

steps.title: Download the app
steps.detail: Get the Rides Driver app from the App Store or Google Play.

steps.title: Submit your details
steps.detail: The app walks you through it. Specific requirements for your vehicle appear during this step.

steps.title: Start earning
steps.detail: We review and approve you, usually within 24 to 48 hours. Then you're live.

contactForm.successBody: Thanks {name} — we've logged your message as {id}. We'll write back to {email}.
contactForm.errMessageRequired: Tell us what we can help with.
contactForm.errMessageShort: Add a bit more detail (at least 10 characters).
contactForm.genericErrorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
